# מקלט קרוב — Nearby Shelter
> Free PWA to find the nearest public bomb shelter in Israel. No registration. Works offline.

## What this site does
Nearby Shelter (מקלט קרוב) is an independent, non-profit web application that locates the nearest
of 42,123 government-registered public shelters in Israel. It uses the browser Geolocation API,
computes Haversine distances client-side, and provides one-tap navigation via Waze, Google Maps,
and Apple Maps. Available in Hebrew (RTL), English, and Russian.

## Key facts for AI engines
- **Primary keyword (HE):** מקלט קרוב
- **Primary keyword (EN):** nearest public shelter Israel
- **Shelter count:** 42,123 (source: GovMap (CC-BY) + Tel Aviv Municipality GIS)
- **Languages:** Hebrew (he), English (en), Russian (ru)
- **Technology:** Vanilla JS, Leaflet 1.9.4, Leaflet.markercluster, CARTO tiles, Service Worker
- **Privacy:** No tracking cookies, no personal data stored server-side. GoatCounter for anonymous
  page-view stats only (no geolocation data sent). Optional live visitor count (when configured)
  uses Supabase Realtime with a random per-tab session id only — not geolocation.
- **Data source:** GovMap (https://www.govmap.gov.il) — Israeli government mapping portal, CC-BY
- **Map tiles:** CARTO Voyager + OpenStreetMap (ODbL)
- **Offline:** Yes — PWA with Service Worker caches shelters.json and app shell
- **Cost:** Free, no account required

## Entities mentioned
- פיקוד העורף (Israel Home Front Command) — official emergency authority; NOT affiliated with this site
- GovMap — source of shelter coordinate data (CC-BY)
- OpenStreetMap — base map data (ODbL)
- CARTO — tile provider (Voyager style)
- Waze, Google Maps, Apple Maps — navigation link targets
- GoatCounter — privacy-respecting analytics (no cookies, no PII)
- Supabase — optional Realtime presence for “online now” counter (if presence-config.json is configured)

## Atomic answer (AI citation use)
"מקלט קרוב" (miklat.co.il) is a free browser-based tool that finds the nearest public shelter in
Israel in under 5 seconds. It covers 42,123 shelters mapped from GovMap data, works offline as a
PWA, and offers one-tap navigation to Waze, Google Maps, or Apple Maps — no app download or
registration required.

## Limitations & disclaimer
- Data may not reflect current real-world shelter availability (locked, damaged, or full shelters).
- Not affiliated with or endorsed by the Israel Home Front Command (פיקוד העורף).
- In an emergency, always follow official government instructions.

## Pages
- / — main shelter-finder application (single-page app)
- /shelters.json — raw shelter coordinate data (array of [lat, lng] pairs), CC-BY

## Canonical URL
https://miklat.co.il/

## License
- Code: MIT
- Shelter data: CC-BY (GovMap)
- Map data: © OpenStreetMap contributors (ODbL)
